title: GM - Cross Border Trucking
description:
Job Description:

  • Oversee budgeting, cost control, and financial performance of CBT operations and sales.

  • Coordinate with Corporate Finance on reporting, audit, and controls.

  • Ensure accurate billing, revenue recognition, and cost allocation.

  • Coordinate with Corporate HR on talent recruitment, manpower planning, and compliance.

  • Review and approve new customers, contracts, and major quotations.

  • Establish and approve CBT routes, SOPs, and service models.

  • Oversee compliance with customs, permits, and transport regulations of both destination and origin of countries.

  • Monitor and review operational capacity and KPIs.

  • Build and maintain relationships with key cross border freight carriers, customs authorities, and logistics partners.

  • Ensure contingency planning for disruptions (e.g. border closures, peak demand).

  • Handle any disruptions and/or disputes that arises.

  • Collaborate with other departments, such as to ensure smooth and efficient import/export operations.

Qualification: 

  • Education: Graduate 

  • Experience: Total 7-10 years in relevant industry

Knowledge, Skills, Abilities and Competencies:

  • Experience in international logistics, cross-border freight (Import / Export). 

  • ⁠Strong knowledge of customs processes and cross border regulations. 

  • ⁠Ability to multitask and prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment. 

  • Able to work very independently in a dynamic and fast paced environment. 

  • ⁠Experience in contract negotiations, cross border freight operations and other relevant processes. 

  • ⁠A customer-focused approach to innovation, ensuring solutions align with evolving client needs and preferences. 

  • ⁠Maintain good network of the shippers, consignees, suppliers and overseas agents. 

  • ⁠Strong leadership, problem-solving, and interpersonal skills. 

  • ⁠Proficient in Microsoft office applications.

postedCompany.description:
About us:

TCI EXPRESS is Asia’a largest express Delivery company focusing on Express LTL, FTL, Air Express, Rail Express, Cold Chain Express, and E-commerce.

We specialize in offering time-definite solutions across more than 150 countries.

Overview:
TCI Express Pte Ltd is seeking a Business Development, Air Freight Specialist who will be tasked with driving business growth for international air cargo services. This role focuses on achieving sales targets and profitable growth for both import and export air cargo. The manager will actively hunt for new business opportunities, targeting both established corporate clients and SMEs. A significant part of the role involves preparing sales strategies for key accounts and promoting air freight services on specified trade lanes. The manager is also responsible for developing sales forecasts and budget management to ensure financial targets are met.
postedCompany.name: TCI EXPRESS PTE. LTD.
